title: Magical Weapons
body:
This mod add some extra and materials such as:
  - **Ender Sword**: made with ender pearls/eyes and has the ability to teleport the  player by right clicking.
  - **Electrified Iron Ingot**: can be collected by getting iron ingot to get striked by lightning, used to make an _Electrified Iron Sword_.
  - **Electrified Iron Sword**: just as powerful as an iron sword with the addition of a 50% chance to get the entity hit to get struck by lightning.
